M0-entity-cardinality-penalty -> skill-advisor EXTENDS but near-no-op (L/S): scorer/lanes/graph-causal.ts:62-70 flat maxBreadth slice + 1/(depth+1), no degree penalty. Advisor skill graph ~22 nodes, n<10 -> quadratic 1/(1+0.001(n-1)^2) ~= 1.0. Real but low-value at skill-graph scale.

Cross-cut NO-TRANSFER (Memory-only, as expected): bitemporal is a Memory-record property; advisor projection regenerated wholesale; deep-loop supersession is iteration-ordinal (resolvedAtIteration), not an event-time interval. Confirms the spearhead stays a Memory-MCP change (per iter-10).
